array.string: sleep 5 printf 'export https_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:20122 http_proxy=http://127.0.0.1:20122 all_proxy=socks5://127.0.0.1:20122\n' > /Users/brahmingwu/.config/zsh/proxy.sh BYPASS=$(/usr/local/bin/jq -r '[.rules[]? | .domain_suffix[]? | select(startswith(".")) | "*" + .] + [.rules[]? | .domain[]?] | unique | join(", ")' /Users/brahmingwu/Documents/AppConf/sing-box/rulesets/direct.json 2>/dev/null) for svc in $(networksetup -listallnetworkservices 2>/dev/null | grep -vE 'Bluetooth|Thunderbolt|iPhone|USB|VPN'); do networksetup -setwebproxy "$svc" 127.0.0.1 20122 2>/dev/null 1>/dev/null networksetup -setsecurewebproxy "$svc" 127.0.0.1 20122 2>/dev/null 1>/dev/null networksetup -setsocksfirewallproxy "$svc" 127.0.0.1 20122 2>/dev/null 1>/dev/null [[ -n "$BYPASS" ]] && networksetup -setproxybypassdomains "$svc" "$BYPASS" 2>/dev/null 1>/dev/null done
